tools.name: text_diff
tools.description: Generate a unified diff between two text strings. Ideal for comparing file versions before and after edits.

tools.name: json_diff
tools.description: Compute a structural diff between two JSON values, showing added, removed, and replaced fields.

tools.name: apply_patch
tools.description: Apply a unified diff patch to an original text and return the patched result.

tools.name: three_way_merge
tools.description: Perform a three-way merge of base, ours, and theirs. Conflicts are marked with standard diff3 conflict markers.

tools.name: diff_stats
tools.description: Parse a unified diff string and return line-level statistics: additions, deletions, hunks, files changed.

tools.name: patch_validate
tools.description: Check whether a unified diff patch can be applied cleanly to an original text without actually applying it.
